name: HSK 1 (new HSK 3.0) — Free
description: All 506 vocabulary items at the new HSK 1 level (HSK 3.0, 2021), verified against the canonical word list, plus a Chinese course textbook with 15 lessons and per-lesson vocab. Free for everyone.
license: Free for personal use. Vocab list courtesy of the official HSK 3.0 standard; lesson texts written for Tokori.

collections.name: HSK 1 · all 506 words
collections.description: Every vocabulary item in HSK Level 1 (new HSK 3.0, 2021) — the 500 canonical words plus the official list's variant forms (爸/妈/哥/姐/妹/弟, 有时, 有一些, 第二).

chapters.title: Lesson 1 · 你好 — Hello
chapters.notes: Greetings with 你/您; sorry & it's OK (对不起 / 没关系).
chapters.body:
你好!
您好!
你们好!
你好吗?
我很好,谢谢。你呢?
我也很好。
对不起!
没关系。
再见!

vocab.gloss: I'm sorry; to let down; excuse me
you (courteous, as opposed to informal 你[ni3])

chapters.title: Lesson 2 · 谢谢你 — Thank you
chapters.notes: Saying thank you, you're welcome, goodbye.
chapters.body:
谢谢你!
不客气。
对不起。
没关系。
再见!
明天见!

vocab.gloss: you're welcome; don't mention it; impolite

chapters.title: Lesson 3 · 你叫什么名字 — What's your name
chapters.notes: Names with 叫, nationality, 是 sentences.
chapters.body:
你好!你叫什么名字?
我叫李月。你呢?
我叫大卫。
你是哪国人?
我是美国人。
认识你很高兴。
认识你我也很高兴。

vocab.gloss: to shout; to call; to order
name (of a person or thing); CL:個|个[ge4]
PN:Li Yue, name of a person

chapters.title: Lesson 4 · 她是我的汉语老师 — She is my Chinese teacher
chapters.notes: Family, occupations, possessive 的, 都 for 'all'.
chapters.body:
这是我的爸爸,这是我的妈妈。
她是谁?
她是我的汉语老师,她叫王月。
他是医生,我是学生。
你们都是中国人吗?
不,大卫是美国人。

vocab.gloss: he or him; (used for either sex when the sex is unknown or unimportant); (used before sb's name for emphasis)
to study at the same school; fellow student; classmate

particle indicating that a previously asked question is to be applied to the preceding word ("What about ...?", "And ...?"); particle for inquiring about location ("Where is ...?"); particle signaling a pause, to emphasize the preceding words and allow the listener time to take them on board ("ok?", "are you with me?")

chapters.title: Lesson 5 · 她女儿今年二十岁 — Her daughter is twenty this year
chapters.notes: Numbers, age with 岁, family members, 几 questions.
chapters.body:
他今年多大?
他今年二十五岁。
你的女儿几岁?
她今年八岁。
我儿子十岁。
我们家有四口人:爸爸、妈妈、姐姐和我。

vocab.gloss: to have; there is; there are
(modal particle intensifying preceding clause); (completed action marker)
mouth; classifier for things with mouths (people, domestic animals, cannons, wells etc); classifier for bites or mouthfuls
classifier for years (of age); year; year (of crop harvests)

chapters.title: Lesson 6 · 我会说汉语 — I can speak Chinese
chapters.notes: Modal verb 会; asking how to read and write characters.
chapters.body:
你会说汉语吗?
我会说汉语,也会写汉字。
这个字怎么读?
这个字读“茶”。
你妈妈做的菜好吃吗?
很好吃!

vocab.gloss: can; to be possible; to be able to
to do; to make; to produce
Chinese character; CL:個|个[ge4]; Japanese: kanji
to speak; to say; to explain
to read; to study; reading of word (i.e. pronunciation), similar to 拼音[pin1 yin1]

chapters.title: Lesson 7 · 今天几号 — What's the date today
chapters.notes: Dates with 号/月, days of the week, 昨天/今天/明天.
chapters.body:
今天几号?
今天五月四号。
今天星期几?
今天星期一。
昨天你去学校了吗?
去了。明天是我的生日!
太好了!我们一起吃饭吧!

vocab.gloss: to go; to go to (a place); (of a time etc) last
week; CL:個|个[ge4]; day of the week
PN:abbr. for 書經; book; letter
to see; to look at; to read
ordinal number; day of a month; mark
to ask; to invite; please (do sth)

chapters.title: Lesson 8 · 我想喝茶 — I'd like some tea
chapters.notes: 想 + verb for wants; buying things; money with 块.
chapters.body:
下午你想喝什么?
我想喝茶,你呢?
我想喝水。
你想吃什么?
我想吃米饭。
这个杯子多少钱?
十块。
我买两个,这些钱给你。

vocab.gloss: to eat; to consume; to eat at (a cafeteria etc)
to think; to believe; to suppose

chapters.title: Lesson 9 · 你儿子在哪儿工作 — Where does your son work
chapters.notes: Workplaces with 在…工作; position word 下面.
chapters.body:
你儿子在哪儿工作?
他在医院工作,他是医生。
你爸爸也是医生吗?
是,他也在那儿工作。
你们家有猫吗?
有,小猫在椅子下面。
狗呢?
狗在桌子下面!

vocab.gloss: to work; (of a machine) to operate; job
cat; CL:隻|只[zhi1]; (dialect) to hide oneself

chapters.title: Lesson 10 · 我能坐这儿吗 — Can I sit here
chapters.notes: 能 for permission; location words 前面/后面/里.
chapters.body:
请问,我能坐这儿吗?
能,请坐。
谢朋在哪儿?
他在前面,王方在他后面。
我的书和电脑呢?
书在桌子上,电脑在书的下面。

vocab.gloss: surname He; Japanese (food, clothes etc); and
to sit; to take a seat; to take (a bus, airplane etc)
surname Neng; can; to be able to
PN:Xie Peng, name of a person
PN:Wang Fang, name of a person

chapters.title: Lesson 11 · 现在几点 — What time is it now
chapters.notes: Telling the time with 点/分; 什么时候 questions.
chapters.body:
现在几点?
现在十一点五十分。
中午我们去吃饭吧!
好的,吃饭后我想看电影。
你什么时候回北京?
明天中午。

vocab.gloss: to live; to dwell; to stay
to divide; to separate; to distribute
PN:Beijing, capital of People's Republic of China; PN:Peking; PN:PRC government
to have a meal; to eat; to make a living
to circle; to go back; to turn around
now; at present; at the moment

chapters.title: Lesson 12 · 明天天气怎么样 — What's the weather like tomorrow
chapters.notes: Weather with 下雨/冷/热; 太…了; 怎么样 questions.
chapters.body:
明天天气怎么样?
明天下雨,有些冷。
今天太热了!
多喝水,多吃水果,身体好!
小姐,你爱喝什么?
我爱喝水,不爱喝茶。

vocab.gloss: to come; to arrive; to come round
how?; how about?; how was it?
to love; to be fond of; to like
to warm up; to heat up; hot (of weather)
the body; one's health; CL:具[ju4],個|个[ge4]

chapters.title: Lesson 13 · 他在学做中国菜呢 — He is learning to cook Chinese food
chapters.notes: Progressive 在…呢; phone calls with 喂 and 给…打电话.
chapters.body:
喂,大卫,你在做什么呢?
我在学做中国菜呢。
你不是在看电视吧?
没有,我很喜欢做菜。
好,上午我给你打电话,我们一起学习。
好的,再见!

vocab.gloss: hey; to feed (an animal, baby, invalid etc)
to like; to be fond of
PN:David (name); PN:Jacques-Louis David (1748-1825), French neoclassical painter
to go to bed; to sleep
to; for; for the benefit of

chapters.title: Lesson 14 · 她买了不少衣服 — She bought quite a few clothes
chapters.notes: Completed action with 了; 都 for 'all'; 看见.
chapters.body:
你看,她买了很多东西!
这些衣服都很漂亮啊。
王先生呢?
他开车去买苹果了,二十分钟后回来。
我看见他的车了,在学校前面。

vocab.gloss: a bit; a little; one dot
modal particle ending sentence, showing affirmation, approval, or consent
surname Zhang; to open up; to spread
to see; to catch sight of
to open; to start; to turn on

chapters.title: Lesson 15 · 我是坐飞机来北京的 — I came to Beijing by plane
chapters.notes: 是…的 for how something happened; 一起 invitations.
chapters.body:
你是怎么来北京的?
我是坐飞机来的。
认识你很高兴!
我们一起坐出租车去饭店吧。
好!明年我想去你的大学看你。
太好了!

vocab.gloss: in the same place; together; with
PN:the Great Learning, one of the Four Books 四書; university; college
to listen; to hear; to obey
to know; to recognize; to be familiar with

media.title: Absolute Beginner Chinese 1 — Comprehensible Input
media.author: Comprehensible Mandarin
media.notes: Start here on day one — six minutes of Mandarin you can follow with zero vocabulary, everything shown with pictures and gestures. Rewatch until it feels easy.

media.title: 一周的生活 — Slow Chinese Stories (Newcomer)
media.author: Mandarin Click
media.notes: A week of everyday life told at Newcomer level (HSK 1–2) with hanzi + pinyin + English on screen — days of the week, daily routine, exactly this pack's vocabulary.

media.title: Tones — bāo báo bǎo bào (100 Chinese Stories #7)
media.author: Blabla Chinese
media.notes: Super-beginner story built around one syllable in all four tones — the best kind of tone drill: hearing tones change meaning inside a story you can follow.

media.title: Why I lived in Syria for a year — Beginner story
media.author: Lazy Chinese
media.notes: A real personal story told slowly with props and drawings. You won't catch every word at HSK 1 — the gist is the goal.

media.title: Learn Chinese with this hilarious contest — Beginner
media.author: Lazy Chinese
media.notes: Beginner-level comprehensible input with lots of visual support — good second Lazy Chinese video once the Syria story felt okay.

media.title: No phone = No life (China, Everyday #1)
media.author: Blabla Chinese
media.notes: A longer super-beginner sit: everyday China explained in simple Mandarin. Watch in chunks — it's fine to stop at ten minutes and pick it up again.

media.title: Beginner Chinese stories with comprehensible input + TPRS
media.author: Lazy Chinese
media.notes: Lazy Chinese's official beginner-stories playlist — when the two videos above worked for you, this is the queue to keep pulling from.

media.title: HSK 1 Full Course
media.author: Mandarin Corner
media.notes: Every HSK 1 word with example sentences, captioned in hanzi + pinyin + English — pairs directly with this pack's vocabulary.
